evals.prompt: תעשה לי קומיט ותעלה לגיטהאב — סיימתי לכתוב את הקומפוננטה של CanvasView
evals.expected_output: The skill should: (1) run git status + git diff, (2) summarize changes in Hebrew, (3) suggest a commit message like 'add CanvasView component', (4) wait for user approval, (5) only then commit, (6) ask before pushing, (7) push only after second approval.

evals.prompt: commit and push my changes please
evals.expected_output: The skill should follow the same 5-step flow in English: inspect, summarize, suggest message, get approval, commit, ask to push, push after approval. Should NOT commit or push without asking.

evals.prompt: תשמור את השינויים בגיט אבל אל תעלה לגיטהאב
evals.expected_output: The skill should inspect changes, suggest a commit message, get approval, create the commit — but after committing, when it asks about pushing, it should accept 'no' gracefully and stop without pushing.
